economic_notes: Nation has investments in construction, forestry, and gas bar business partnerships. Stqo:ya Construction LP generated revenue of $14,976,396. Sqewqel Development Corporation LLP generated revenue of $1,166,836. Sqewqel Gas Bar LLP generated revenue of $3,769,310. COVID-19 noted as not materially impacting operations.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Four entities fully consolidated: Seabird Education Society, Seabird Island Holdings Ltd., Seabird Island Forestry Company Ltd., Seabird Island Forestry Limited Partnership. Five business entities accounted for under modified equity method: Stqo:ya Construction Ltd., Stqo:ya Construction LP, Sqewqel Development Corporation LLP, Sqewqel Gas Bar LLP, Sqewqel Development Corporation. Deferred revenue was nil at year-end (prior year $967,665 fully recognized). Internally restricted cash of $10,039,043 included in cash balance. Nation guarantees individual Band member mortgages totalling $1,986,902 and Sqewqel Gas Bar LLP debt of approximately $1,044,494. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. OSR calculated as economic activity and other income plus rental income plus investment income plus earnings from partnerships = $5,138,616 + $1,117,342 + $826,547 + $1,258,657 + $172,416 (Sto:lo Nation portion that may be OSR unclear) — conservatively OSR set to segment-disclosed economic activities and other of $6,513,578. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $16,455,795 + other government $15,955,596 = $32,411,391.
